Class WaitingListController

java.lang.Object
Controllers.BaseDisplayController
Controllers.WaitingListController
public class WaitingListController extends BaseDisplayController
Controller for the Waiting List UI. Displays the current week's waiting list in a table with columns for user info, reservation details, and exit reasons. Handles loading the waiting list from the server and navigation.

    • WaitingListController

      public WaitingListController()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the controller. Sets up the table columns, formats dates and times, registers a handler for weekly waiting list updates, and loads the current week's waiting list.

    • loadCurrentWeekWaitingList

      private void loadCurrentWeekWaitingList()
      Requests the current week's waiting list from the server.

    • getWaitingListTable

      public javafx.scene.control.TableView<WaitingListEntry> getWaitingListTable()
      Returns the TableView containing waiting list entries.
      Returns:
      the TableView of WaitingListEntry

    • onPreviousPage

      private void onPreviousPage()
      Handles navigation back to the previous page (Supervisor UI).

    • showReservations

      public void showReservations(List<Reservation> list)
      Overrides the method from BaseDisplayController. Currently not used for waiting list but required by superclass.
      Specified by:
      showReservations in class BaseDisplayController
      Parameters:
      list - the list of reservations (unused)
